name.zh: 宏德度量衡科技有限公司

desc.zh: 我們專注於智能秤設備與智能稱重系統整合，為食品加工、倉儲物流、冷鏈、車輛過磅等場景提供可採集、可追溯、可串接的稱重解決方案，協助客戶把現場秤重升級為可管理的數據流程。
desc.en: We specialize in smart scale devices and intelligent weighing system integration, delivering traceable and connected weighing solutions for food processing, warehouse logistics, cold-chain, and vehicle weighing scenarios.

mission.zh: 讓每一台智能秤都成為企業數據流程的一部分。
mission.en: Make every smart scale a connected part of the enterprise data workflow.

desc.zh: 國際法制計量組織認證
所有智能秤終端皆經校準與測試，兼顧精度、穩定性與現場耐用度
desc.en: Every smart scale terminal is calibrated and tested for precision, stability, and real-world durability

desc.zh: 提供現場評估、安裝、培訓與維護，確保設備與流程真正落地
desc.en: On-site assessment, installation, training, and maintenance ensure real operational adoption

desc.zh: 可依據產線、倉儲或車輛過磅情境，客製智能秤規格與系統功能
desc.en: Customize smart scale specifications and system features for production, warehouse, or vehicle weighing scenarios

desc.zh: 以資料採集、報表與系統串接為核心，持續優化智能稱重能力
desc.en: Continuously improve smart weighing capability through data capture, reporting, and integration
